title: User can navigate to the chapter list page
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the manga '俺のメンタルは限界です' by 藤アイリ. | Click on the '話一覧' (Chapter List) tab.
expected_result: The user should be on the chapter list page for the manga '俺のメンタルは限界です'.

title: User can read the first chapter for free
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the manga '俺のメンタルは限界です' by 藤アイリ. | Click on the '話一覧' (Chapter List) tab. | Click on the '今すぐ読めます!' (Read Now!) button.
expected_result: The user should be able to read the first chapter of the manga '俺のメンタルは限界です' for free.

title: User can sort the chapter list
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the manga '俺のメンタルは限界です' by 藤アイリ. | Click on the '話一覧' (Chapter List) tab. | Click on the '並び替え' (Sort) button.
expected_result: The chapter list should be sorted according to the user's selection.

title: User can navigate to the work information page
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the manga '俺のメンタルは限界です' by 藤アイリ. | Click on the '話一覧' (Chapter List) tab. | Click on the '作品情報' (Work Information) tab.
expected_result: The user should be on the work information page for the manga '俺のメンタルは限界です'.

title: User can add a chapter to favorites
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the manga '俺のメンタルは限界です' by 藤アイリ. | Click on the '話一覧' (Chapter List) tab. | Click on the '今すぐ読めます!' (Read Now!) button for the first chapter. | Locate and click on the yellow star icon to add the chapter to favorites.
expected_result: The chapter should be added to the user's favorites list.

title: User can navigate back to the chapter list after reading a chapter
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the manga '俺のメンタルは限界です' by 藤アイリ. | Click on the '話一覧' (Chapter List) tab. | Click on the '今すぐ読めます!' (Read Now!) button for the first chapter. | Navigate back to the chapter list page.
expected_result: The user should be back on the chapter list page for the manga '俺のメンタルは限界です'.

title: User can resume reading a chapter after interruption
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the manga '俺のメンタルは限界です' by 藤アイリ. | Click on the '話一覧' (Chapter List) tab. | Click on the '今すぐ読めます!' (Read Now!) button for the first chapter. | Pause the reading session. | Resume the reading session.
expected_result: The user should be able to resume reading the chapter from the point where they paused.
